canonical_definition: The latent ability of a model to comprehend, query, and synthesize information from structured tabular data to address natural language prompts.
papers: Seeing More, Saying More: Lightweight Language Experts are Dynamic Video Token Compressors
Bias Beware: The Impact of Cognitive Biases onLLM-Driven Product Recommendations
VideoEraser: Concept Erasure in Text-to-Video Diffusion Models
UniformInformationDensity and Syntactic Reduction: Revisiting *that*-Mentioning inEnglish Complement Clauses
OpenTab: Advancing Large Language Models as Open-domain Table Reasoners
Chain-of-Table: Evolving Tables in the Reasoning Chain for Table Understanding
MAVIS: Mathematical Visual Instruction Tuning with an Automatic Data Engine
Sketch2Diagram: Generating Vector Diagrams from Hand-Drawn Sketches
MAPS: Advancing Multi-Modal Reasoning in Expert-Level Physical Science
Bridging the Semantic Gap Between Text and Table: A Case Study on NL2SQL

TableRAG: Million-Token Table Understanding with Language Models
TabPedia: Towards Comprehensive Visual Table Understanding with Concept Synergy

definitions.text: The latent ability of a model to comprehend, query, and synthesize information from structured tabular data to address natural language prompts.
definitions.paper: OpenTab: Advancing Large Language Models as Open-domain Table Reasoners

definitions.text: The capacity to solve questions or verification problems by extracting and manipulating information from tables through intermediate reasoning steps.
definitions.paper: Chain-of-Table: Evolving Tables in the Reasoning Chain for Table Understanding

definitions.text: The ability to understand and reason across multiple interdependent tables, integrating information from different sources into a unified analysis.
definitions.paper: Bias Beware: The Impact of Cognitive Biases onLLM-Driven Product Recommendations

definitions.text: The degree to which visual representations of mathematical diagrams are aligned with language representations so the model can correctly interpret diagram content in text form.
definitions.paper: MAVIS: Mathematical Visual Instruction Tuning with an Automatic Data Engine

definitions.text: The latent ability of a model to comprehend the components, layout, and semantic meaning of a diagram from an image.
definitions.paper: Sketch2Diagram: Generating Vector Diagrams from Hand-Drawn Sketches

definitions.text: The perceptual ability to correctly interpret the components, their properties, and their structural relationships within a diagram representing a physical system.
definitions.paper: MAPS: Advancing Multi-Modal Reasoning in Expert-Level Physical Science

definitions.text: The latent ability to interpret and understand the structured information presented in diagrams.
definitions.paper: VideoEraser: Concept Erasure in Text-to-Video Diffusion Models

definitions.text: The latent ability of a language model to comprehend and process information presented in a structured tabular format.
definitions.paper: TableRAG: Million-Token Table Understanding with Language Models

definitions.text: The model's latent ability to comprehend the structure, content, and semantics of tables presented in a visual format, such as a document image.
definitions.paper: TabPedia: Towards Comprehensive Visual Table Understanding with Concept Synergy

definitions.text: The ability to interpret the semantic meaning of table columns and their relationships, such as identifying primary and foreign keys.
definitions.paper: MMQA: Evaluating LLMs with Multi-Table Multi-Hop Complex Questions

definitions.text: The latent ability to comprehend information distributed across multiple related tables and use that structure to support downstream task performance.
definitions.paper: MMQA: Evaluating LLMs with Multi-Table Multi-Hop Complex Questions

definitions.text: The ability to visually recognize and represent table structures and contents from table images.
